endpoints.name: Used to understand API usage
endpoints.description: Remaining window and remaining count details, also returns reports that have been generated by this account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{STATSOCIAL_API_KEY}} with your STATSOCIAL API KEY.

endpoints.name: Obtain report output
endpoints.description: Output is ordered by Demographic and followed by Affinity information. For each data point the following metrics are provided value, count, mean, percentile, multiplicity and average. For Geographic, and Demographic data points an additional statistical_info metric will be present with information regarding statistical relevance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{STATSOCIAL_API_KEY}} with your STATSOCIAL API KEY.

endpoints.name: Step 3 of executing custom report
endpoints.description: Used to create a custom report. This report treats the list of ids or handles as the audience (not their followers as in the twitter report). To create follower or tweet reports other methods must be used.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{STATSOCIAL_API_KEY}} with your STATSOCIAL API KEY.

endpoints.name: Used to create tweet reports
endpoints.description: This report details the audience of the users who have tweeted content that matches what was provided in the keywords. To create custom or twitter reports other methods must be used.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{STATSOCIAL_API_KEY}} with your STATSOCIAL API KEY.

endpoints.name: Used to create tweet reports
endpoints.description: This report details the audience of the users who have tweeted content that matches what was provided in the keywords. To create custom or twitter reports other methods must be used.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{STATSOCIAL_API_KEY}} with your STATSOCIAL API KEY.

endpoints.name: Used to create twitter follower report
endpoints.description: This report uses the twitter followers as the audience. To create custom or tweet reports other methods must be used. Any report older than two days will be automatically regenerated upon create.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{STATSOCIAL_API_KEY}} with your STATSOCIAL API KEY.

endpoints.name: Used to create twitter follower report
endpoints.description: This report uses the twitter followers as the audience. To create custom or tweet reports other methods must be used. Any report older than two days will be automatically regenerated upon create.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{STATSOCIAL_API_KEY}} with your STATSOCIAL API KEY.
